title: crepis runcinata subsp. hispidulosa
intro: Crepis runcinata subsp. hispidulosa is a subspecies of the Hawkbit plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Crepis runcinata subsp. hispidulosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, or other medicinal products.
